name: OmopConditionConditionOccurrenceView
title: Condition → condition_occurrence (FHIR-flat, stage 1; per-coding fan-out)
description:
Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP. One staging row per `Condition.code.coding[]` (and `Condition.evidence.concept.coding[]`) entry instead of one row per Condition. Stage 2 resolves each coding through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab + Maps-to, dedups when two codings of the same Condition resolve to the same standard concept_id, and routes by std.domain_id to the appropriate OMOP table (condition_occurrence / observation / procedure_occurrence / measurement).

Diff page caveat: the reference Synthea CSV loader picks one coding per condition (the cdm.* oracle), so cdm.* and cdm_ours_fhir.* will no longer line up by source_value. Diff is still meaningful on (person_id, std concept_id, start_date) — see GAPS.md.

column.name: recorder_ref
column.description: → provider_id when asserter is absent (Patient/person review §4.8).

column.name: code_text
column.description: Human-readable label, used as condition_source_value when no coding resolves.

column.name: category_code
column.description: encounter-diagnosis / problem-list-item / health-concern → condition_type_concept_id via cm.fhir_condition_category_to_omop.

column.name: code_system
column.description: Coding.system (e.g. http://snomed.info/sct, http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm). Looked up via cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab → Athena vocabulary_id.

column.name: code_display
column.description: Coding.display, used as condition_source_value when present.
